notable_prs.title: Add Redis caching layer for user profiles
notable_prs.description: Adds a Redis caching layer for user profile lookups with TTL-based expiry and cache invalidation on update.
quality_signals: but Ana caught a concurrency issue in review

notable_prs.title: Add pagination to all list endpoints
notable_prs.description: Standardized pagination across all list endpoints using a shared paginate() helper with consistent defaults.

review_quality_samples.comment: This works, but the retry logic is buried inside the handler. If we extract it into a withRetry() wrapper, we can reuse it for the email sender and the Stripe webhook too. Want me to pair on this? I refactored something similar last sprint.
review_quality_samples.quality: exceptional — sees the bigger picture, offers to pair

goals_detail.goal: Add caching layer for user profiles
Write onboarding guide for new eng

anthropic_usage.quality_note: Uses AI for repetitive tasks. Hasn't adopted it for design or architecture thinking yet — opportunity for growth.
